titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 152: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 152. (A.R. No. 669 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYIL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine, Māsilāmaṇīśvara temple.

It records that the sabhā of Ambattūr in Ambattūr-nāḍu in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam sold several pieces of land, amounting to 9300 kuḻi of land, after exempting them from taxes for eighty kaḻañju of gold to Śembiyaṉ-Mādēviyār, the queen of śrī-Gaṇḍarādittaperumāḷ and daughter of Maḻavaraiyar. With this land, one nāḻi of oil was to be measured out daily to the god, Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiya-Mahādēva by an individual Taṉkūṭṭam-uḍaiyāṉ Vaṇṇakkaṉ alias Vayaṉa Sundaraṉ, who was also conferred the right to draw water from the tank of the village both talaivāy and kaḍaivāy. The madhyastha of the village Śuṟṟi Kaṇḍattaḍigaḷ wrote the document on the order of the sabhā.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III No. 141.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesariparmmarāṉa Uttamacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 (l)lāvatu maḻavaraiyar makaḷār śrīkaṇṭirātittaperumāḷ teviyār cempiyaṉmāteviyār pakkal puḻaṟkoṭṭattu Ampattūrnāṭṭu Ampattūr sabhaiyo
m poṉ Eṇpatiṉ kaḻañcu koṇṭu Iṟai Iḻicci vaicca nilam kiḻeripaṭṭu melpāṟkellai pāṇṭivāyttuṟaikkuk kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai kirainallūr Oḻuṟkai cāntikuṇṭilum Uṭppaṭa vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai mu
ṉainallūrkku poṉa peruvatikku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai Erikaraikku teṟkum IvūrRead ivvūrnāppākellaiyuḻṭpaṭṭa nilam patinaṟu cāṇ ko(l)lā koyilāṉpaṭṭi kuḻi ĀyirattiranūṟumRead āyirattirunūṟumItaṉ kiḻaicceṟu kuḻi Āyiramum
Itaṉ teṟkil meṭṭettam kuḻi Āyiramum paḷḷakkaḻuval kuḻi Aṟuṉūṟum Itaṉ teṟkil meṭṭettam kuḻi Āyirattiruṉūṟum Itaṉ vaṭakkil maṇaliṭum koraikkuḻiyumuppaṭaRead muṭpaṭakuḻi Āyiramum puñcai viḷainilam mārttumālai ko
llaiyuṭpaṭa kuḻi muvāyirattu Iruṉūṟum Āka kuḻi Oṉpatiṉāyirattu muṉṉūṟum nampirāṭṭiyār cempiyaṉmāteviyārkku yiṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟu kuṭuttom Ampattūr sabhaiyom yiṉṉilaṅkoṇṭu tirumullaivāyil Uṭai
yamātevarkku nicatam nāḻi Eṇṇai Aṭṭakkaṭavaṉāka Aṭṭumiṭattu taṉ kūṭṭamuṭaiyāṉ vaṇṇakkaṉāṉa vayaṉacuntaraṉ Iṉṉilattukku Eṅkaḷ Eriyil talainirum kaṭainirum pāccikkoḷḷak kaṭavaṉākavum Iṉṉilattil meṉo
kkiyamaramum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum Aṉupavikka peṟuvarākavum Iṉṉilaṅ taṭiyātoṉṟum pecappeṟātomākavum IpparitaRead ipparicuviṟṟu kuṭuttom Ampattūr mahaāsabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Ivvūr mattiastaṉ cuṟṟikaṇṭattaṭikaḷeṉ I
vai Eṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāhesara rakṣaiRead panmāheśvara§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
